channel.title: Investigation on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Investigation on Alien Truth Social

item.title: National Investigations Committee On Aerial Phenomena
item.description:
The National Investigations Committee On Aerial Phenomena (NICAP) was a UFO research organization active in the United States from 1956 to 1980. Despite facing financial difficulties, NICAP gained significant visibility and respectability, advocating for scientific investigation of UFO sightings and arguing for a governmental cover-up of UFO evidence. The organization’s membership fluctuated, peaking in the early 1960s before declining sharply after the publication of the Condon Report. NICAP officially dissolved in 1980, and its archives were later acquired by the Center for UFO Studies.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/National_Investigations_Committee_On_Aerial_Phenomena

item.title: Gabriel L. 'Gabe' Valdez: Investigator of Cattle Mutilations
item.description:
Gabriel L. “Gabe” Valdez was a New Mexico State Police officer and Gaming Control Board investigator known for leading the criminal investigation into livestock mutilations in 1970s New Mexico. During his investigations, Valdez reported a mysterious aircraft and the discovery of tranquilizing and blood-removing drugs in mutilated animal remains. His son later stated that Valdez believed the mutilations were a government testing program, not alien activity. Valdez passed away on August 7, 2011.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gabe_Valdez
